async fn compute_stats(items: Vec<Item>) -> Stats {
    let totals = tokio::task::spawn_blocking(move || {
        let mut t = Vec::with_capacity(items.len());
        for item in &items {
            let value = heavy_sync_computation(item);
            t.push(value);
        }
        t
    })
    .await
    .unwrap();
    let sum: f64 = totals.iter().sum();
    Stats { count: totals.len(), sum }
}

fn heavy_sync_computation(item: &Item) -> f64 {
    let mut result = 0.0;
    for i in 0..1_000_000 {
        result += (item.value + i as f64).sqrt();
    }
    result
}

struct Item { value: f64 }
struct Stats { count: usize, sum: f64 }
